name: Crock-Pot Chili Con Carne
recipeIngredient: 4 cans Red kidney beans, 1 lb each
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat shortening in a skillet and brown the beef. Discard any excess fat.
2. Combine all ingredients in the removable liner of the crockpot, stirring well.
3. Place the liner in the base of the crockpot.
4. Cover and cook on low for 8-10 hours or high for 4-5 hours. Auto-cook setting is 6-7 hours.
